items.title:
This is American Anarchy vs Chinese Control.

American Anarchy is the superposition of left- and right-libertarianism, taken to their extremes. We are all equal and you ain't the boss of me. So no one is in charge, and everything is in chaos. America is all about consent, and also no one consents.

Chinese Control is the opposite. It's the total integration of nation, state, and network into one collectivist whole. Roughly 96% of people of Han Chinese descent are now governed by the communist one party-state and organized by apps within the Chinese network. China is all about cooperation, and also everyone better cooperate.

A useful goal is to carve out an Internet Intermediate, which is about consensual cooperation. Combine the voluntarism of the West with the cooperation of the East.

If we had many different jurisdictions, you could sign a social smart contract prior to entering a jurisdiction that limited the power of both digital and physical government. You then abide by it so long as you're within that jurisdiction, or exit it by leaving. This balances consent with cooperation. You opt in to constraints.

items.title_zh:
这是美国的无政府状态与中国的控制。

美国的无政府状态是左翼和右翼自由主义的叠加，并走向极端。我们都是平等的，你不是我的老板。于是无人负责，一切一片混乱。美国讲究的是同意，但也没有人同意。

中国控制则相反。它是将民族、国家和网络完全整合为一个集体主义整体。大约 96% 的汉族人现在受到共产主义一党国家的统治，并由中国网络内的应用程序组织。中国讲究合作，也希望大家更好地合作。

一个有用的目标是创建一个互联网中间体，它涉及共识合作。将西方的自愿主义与东方的合作结合起来。

如果我们有许多不同的司法管辖区，您可以在进入限制数字和实体政府权力的司法管辖区之前签署社会智能合约。只要您在该管辖范围内，您就必须遵守该管辖范围，或者通过离开来退出该管辖范围。这平衡了同意与合作。您选择接受限制。

items.title:
We should build more crypto tools for refugees and stateless people.

Because there may unfortunately be many more refugees and stateless people…and from all social classes.

Ukrainians leaving the war.
Californians leaving the state.
Gulf workers leaving the missiles.

Doesn’t necessarily mean huge design changes. If you build convenient consumer tools for millions that work in peacetime, then they’ll often be robust enough to work in wartime.

Because crypto is wartime mode, but for the Internet. Public blockchains were created to resist datacenter attacks, hacks, and network blocks.

It’s simply enlightened self-interest to build scalable, reliable tools. For example: Signal works for poor people in poor countries in poor conditions, so it’ll likely work for you. 

Stablecoins are actually getting to this level of ubiquity in crypto, and already making a real dent globally, including the new gold-backed varieties.

But we can do more.

items.title_zh:
我们应该为难民和无国籍人建立更多的加密工具。

因为不幸的是，可能会有更多的难民和无国籍人……而且来自各个社会阶层。

乌克兰人离开战争。
加州人离开该州。
海湾工人离开导弹。

并不一定意味着巨大的设计改变。如果你为数百万人在和平时期工作构建了方便的消费工具，那么它们通常会足够强大，可以在战时工作。

因为加密货币是战时模式，但针对互联网。创建公共区块链是为了抵御数据中心攻击、黑客攻击和网络封锁。

构建可扩展、可靠的工具只是出于开明的自身利益。例如：Signal 适用于贫困国家条件恶劣的穷人，因此它可能也适合您。 

事实上，稳定币在加密货币中已经达到了普遍存在的程度，并且已经在全球范围内产生了真正的影响，包括新的黄金支持品种。

但我们可以做得更多。

items.title_original: Sources: Meta plans sweeping layoffs that could affect 20% or more of the company, amid mounting AI infrastructure costs; it had ~79,000 employees as of Dec. 31 (Reuters)
